a queue, man = Aquaman. 'A queue, man' said aloud sounds like 'Aquaman'.

burning (to be on fire, actively combusting, quite warm) + man (an adult male human, generic bloke) = Burning-man = Burning Man

hem (the edge of fabric) + el (a small one, a little) + hemp (a plant, associated with rope and fabric) + stead (an old word for a farmstead or homestead) = Hemel Hempstead. Hem-el-hemp-stead.
woke (awakened, roused from sleep) + ing (still going, ongoing) = Woking. Woke-ing.
